  • Hide All Code
  • Download Rmd

Script to validate points in ReSurvey database using RS data (Landsat)

Fitting Random Forest models with ntree = 1500

Alicia Valdés

18 junio 2026

This R script is used to validate the points in the ReSurvey database using RS indicators from Landsat (indices + phenology).

Load libraries

library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(parallel)
library(doParallel)
library(moreparty)
library(caret)
library(randomForest)
library(pROC)
library(rlang)
library(stringr)
library(beepr)
library(permimp)
library(purrr)
library(gghalves)
library(patchwork)
library(scales)

Load functions

knitr::purl("functions_20260611_reduced.Rmd", output = "functions_20260611_reduced.R")

[1] "functions_20260611_reduced.R"
source("functions_20260611_reduced.R")

Load previously created objects

# Define the folder path
folder_path <- here("objects", "RF_1500_20260608")

# List all .RData or .rda files in the folder
rdata_files <- list.files(folder_path, full.names = TRUE)

# Load each file
lapply(rdata_files, load, envir = .GlobalEnv)
[[1]]

# Load varimp objects
lapply(list.files(here("objects", "RF_1500_varimp_20260608"), full.names = TRUE), load,
       envir = .GlobalEnv)
list()
# Load ROC objects
lapply(list.files(here("objects", "RF_1500_ROC_20260608"), full.names = TRUE), load,
       envir = .GlobalEnv)
list()

Read data

data_validation_Landsat <- read_tsv(here(
  "data", "clean","final_RS_data_bands_Landsat_all_20260611.csv"))

No parsing issues!

nrow(data_validation_Landsat)
[1] 120093

Define lists of predictor variables

Moments with slope method

vars_RF_slope_Landsat <- c(
  # Min values of all indices
  "NDVI_min", "NDMI_min", "NDWI_min", "SAVI_min",
  # Max values of NDMI and NDWI
  "NDMI_max", "NDWI_max",
  # AUC of NDVI and SAVI
  "NDVI_auc", "SAVI_auc",
  # Values of NDVI and SAVI at sos, pos and eos
  "NDVI_sos_value", "NDVI_pos_value", "NDVI_eos_value",
  "SAVI_sos_value", "SAVI_pos_value", "SAVI_eos_value",
  # Differences pos-sos in value and doy
  "NDVI_diff_pos_sos_value","SAVI_diff_pos_sos_value",
  "NDVI_diff_pos_sos_doy", "SAVI_diff_pos_sos_doy",
  # Differences pos-eos in value and doy
  "NDVI_diff_pos_eos_value", "SAVI_diff_pos_eos_value",
  "NDVI_diff_pos_eos_doy", "SAVI_diff_pos_eos_doy",
  # Growing season duration
  "NDVI_gsd", "SAVI_gsd")

Months method

vars_RF_months_Landsat <- c(
  # Min values of all indices
  "NDVI_min", "NDMI_min", "NDWI_min", "SAVI_min",
  # Max values of NDMI and NDWI
  "NDMI_max", "NDWI_max",
  # AUC of NDVI, and SAVI between march and oct
  "NDVI_auc_mar_oct", "SAVI_auc_mar_oct",
  # Values of NDVI and SAVI at march, pos and oct
  "NDVI_avg_value_03", "NDVI_pos_value", "NDVI_avg_value_10",
  "SAVI_avg_value_03", "SAVI_pos_value", "SAVI_avg_value_10",
  # Differences pos-march in value and doy
  "NDVI_diff_pos_march_value", "SAVI_diff_pos_march_value",
  "NDVI_diff_pos_march_doy", "SAVI_diff_pos_march_doy",
  # Differences pos-oct in value and doy
  "NDVI_diff_pos_oct_value", "SAVI_diff_pos_oct_value",
  "NDVI_diff_pos_oct_doy", "SAVI_diff_pos_oct_doy")

Filter data to use in RF models

Functions

get_full_datasets <- function(data, variables) {
  data %>%
    mutate(EUNIS1 = as.factor(EUNIS1)) %>%
    # Remove rows with missing values in predictors
    dplyr::filter(if_all(all_of(variables), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    # Remove all rows with wrong values of indices (not between -1 and 1)
    dplyr::filter(NDVI_max <= 1 & NDVI_min >= -1) %>%
    dplyr::filter(SAVI_max <= 1 & SAVI_min >= -1) %>%
    dplyr::filter(NDMI_max <= 1 & NDMI_min >= -1) %>%
    dplyr::filter(NDWI_max <= 1 & NDWI_min >= -1) %>%
    # Keep only rows with differences > 0 in variables
    dplyr::filter(if_all(any_of(variables[grepl("diff", variables)]), 
                  ~ .x > 0)) %>%
    # Filter based on max NDWI
    mutate(valid_1_NDWI = case_when(NDWI_max > 0.3 ~ "wrong", 
                                    TRUE ~ NA_character_),
           valid_1_count = rowSums(across(c(valid_1_NDWI), ~ . == "wrong"), 
                                   na.rm = TRUE),
           valid_1 = if_else(valid_1_count > 0,
                             "At least 1 rule broken", "No rules broken so far")
           ) %>%
    # Keep only rows with no rules broken
    dplyr::filter(valid_1 == "No rules broken so far") %>%
    # Remove unneeded cols
    select(-starts_with("valid"))
  }
get_training_subsets <- function(data, variables) {
  data %>%
    mutate(EUNIS1 = as.factor(EUNIS1)) %>%
    # Remove rows with missing values in predictors
    dplyr::filter(if_all(all_of(variables), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    # Remove all rows with wrong values of indices (not between -1 and 1)
    dplyr::filter(NDVI_max <= 1 & NDVI_min >= -1) %>%
    dplyr::filter(SAVI_max <= 1 & SAVI_min >= -1) %>%
    dplyr::filter(NDMI_max <= 1 & NDMI_min >= -1) %>%
    dplyr::filter(NDWI_max <= 1 & NDWI_min >= -1) %>%
    # Keep only rows with differences > 0 in variables
    dplyr::filter(if_all(any_of(variables[grepl("diff", variables)]), 
                  ~ .x > 0)) %>%
    # Filter based on max NDWI
    mutate(valid_1_NDWI = case_when(NDWI_max > 0.3 ~ "wrong", 
                                    TRUE ~ NA_character_),
           valid_1_count = rowSums(across(c(valid_1_NDWI), ~ . == "wrong"), 
                                   na.rm = TRUE),
           valid_1 = if_else(valid_1_count > 0,
                             "At least 1 rule broken", "No rules broken so far")
           ) %>%
    # Keep only rows with no rules broken
    dplyr::filter(valid_1 == "No rules broken so far") %>%
    # Remove unneeded cols
    select(-starts_with("valid")) %>%
    # Select only GPS points
    dplyr::filter(`Location method` == "Location with GPS" | 
                    `Location method` == "Location with differential GPS") %>%
    # Filter based on NDVI percentiles
    filter_by_group_percentiles("NDVI_pos_value")
  }

Get full datasets and training subsets

full_dataset_slope <- data_validation_Landsat %>%
  get_full_datasets(vars_RF_slope_Landsat)
full_dataset_months <- data_validation_Landsat %>%
  get_full_datasets(vars_RF_months_Landsat)  
training_subset_slope <- data_validation_Landsat %>%
  get_training_subsets(vars_RF_slope_Landsat)
training_subset_months <- data_validation_Landsat %>%
  get_training_subsets(vars_RF_months_Landsat)

N obs

nrow(full_dataset_slope)
[1] 115024
nrow(full_dataset_months)
[1] 98905
nrow(training_subset_slope)
[1] 83037
nrow(training_subset_months)
[1] 73552

(Appendix 5) Plots distribution max NDVI

plot_perc_Landsat <- full_dataset_months %>%
    # Select only GPS points
    dplyr::filter(`Location method` == "Location with GPS" | 
                    `Location method` == "Location with differential GPS") %>%
  distr_plot("NDVI_pos_value", "Maximum NDVI", grey = T) +
  scale_x_discrete(limits = c("T", "S", "R", "Q"),
                   labels = c("T" = "T - Forests", "S" = "S - Shrublands",
                              "R" = "R - Grasslands", "Q" = "Q - Wetlands"))
plot_perc_Landsat
ggsave(here("output", "figures", "manuscript", "appendix5.jpeg"), 
       dpi = 300, width = 5, height = 4)

Fit RF models (level 1)

Without refinement

Split into training and test data sets

Split data:

# Slope
set.seed(123)
split_data_slope_Landsat <- split_train_test(training_subset_slope)

train_data_slope_Landsat <- split_data_slope_Landsat$train
test_data_slope_Landsat <- split_data_slope_Landsat$test

# Check overlap between training and testing datasets
sum(train_data_slope_Landsat$PlotObservationID %in% test_data_slope_Landsat$PlotObservationID)
[1] 0
# Months
set.seed(123)
split_data_months_Landsat <- split_train_test(training_subset_months)

train_data_months_Landsat <- split_data_months_Landsat$train
test_data_months_Landsat <- split_data_months_Landsat$test

# Check overlap between training and testing datasets
sum(train_data_months_Landsat$PlotObservationID %in% test_data_months_Landsat$PlotObservationID)
[1] 0

Fit models

models_no_refin <- c("rf_slope_Landsat", "rf_months_Landsat")

Print the time:

for (model_name in models_no_refin) {
  obj <- get(model_name)
  cat("Time for", model_name, ":\n")
  print(obj$time)
}
Time for rf_slope_Landsat :
   user  system elapsed 
  57.10   23.59  917.35 
Time for rf_months_Landsat :
   user  system elapsed 
  40.44   10.09  703.38

Save:

Predictions

predictions_no_refin <- c("rf_slope_Landsat_prediction", 
                          "rf_months_Landsat_prediction")

Save:

Confusion matrices

for (prediction_name in predictions_no_refin) {
  # Derive test data name by replacing "_prediction" with "" 
  # and "rf_" with "test_data_"
  test_data_name <- paste0("test_data_", sub("^rf_", "", sub("_prediction$", "",
                                                             prediction_name)))
  
  # Get prediction and test data
  prediction <- get(prediction_name)
  test_data <- get(test_data_name)
  
  # Compute confusion matrix
  cat("Confusion Matrix for", sub("_prediction$", "", prediction_name), ":\n")
  print(confusionMatrix(prediction, test_data$EUNIS1))
  cat("\n")
}
Confusion Matrix for rf_slope_Landsat :
Confusion Matrix and Statistics

          Reference
Prediction    Q    R    S    T
         Q  126  280   91  164
         R 2411 9653 1826 2765
         S  416  982  303  581
         T  994 1763 1096 1461

Overall Statistics
                                          
               Accuracy : 0.4634          
                 95% CI : (0.4571, 0.4696)
    No Information Rate : 0.5089          
    P-Value [Acc > NIR] : 1               
                                          
                  Kappa : 0.1068          
                                          
 Mcnemar's Test P-Value : <2e-16          

Statistics by Class:

                     Class: Q Class: R Class: S Class: T

Plots

for (prediction_name in predictions_no_refin) {
  # Derive name of test data
  test_data_name <- paste0("test_data_", sub("^rf_", "", sub("_prediction$", "",
                                                             prediction_name)))
  
  # Obtain objects
  prediction <- get(prediction_name)
  test_data <- get(test_data_name)

  # Personalized title
  title <- paste(#"Confusion Matrix for", 
    sub("_prediction$", "",
                                              prediction_name))

  # Plot
  print(plot_confusion_matrix(prediction, test_data$EUNIS1, title))
}

Refinement step 1

Based on PAs “Morralla protocol”.

Compute predictions for all data and combine with original data

Detect probability columns

Calculate auxiliary metrics

Apply filtering function

Applying “Morralla” protocol once, removing negatives until 20% of the class and, if there is room, uncertain positives until 10% of the rest.

Save

filtered_data_with_probs <- c("filtered_data_20_10_slope_Landsat_probs", 
                              "filtered_data_20_10_months_Landsat_probs")

Save:

Compare classes before and after

compare_classes(training_subset_slope, filtered_data_20_10_slope_Landsat_probs)

compare_classes(training_subset_months, filtered_data_20_10_months_Landsat_probs)

Split into training and testing

# Landsat
# Slope
set.seed(123)
split_data_20_10_slope_Landsat <- split_train_test(filtered_data_20_10_slope_Landsat_probs)

train_data_20_10_slope_Landsat <- split_data_20_10_slope_Landsat$train
test_data_20_10_slope_Landsat <- split_data_20_10_slope_Landsat$test

# Check overlap between training and testing datasets
sum(train_data_20_10_slope_Landsat$PlotObservationID %in% test_data_20_10_slope_Landsat$PlotObservationID)
[1] 0
# Months
set.seed(123)
split_data_20_10_months_Landsat <- split_train_test(filtered_data_20_10_months_Landsat_probs)

train_data_20_10_months_Landsat <- split_data_20_10_months_Landsat$train
test_data_20_10_months_Landsat <- split_data_20_10_months_Landsat$test

# Check overlap between training and testing datasets
sum(train_data_20_10_months_Landsat$PlotObservationID %in% test_data_20_10_months_Landsat$PlotObservationID)
[1] 0

Fit models

                        "rf_months_Landsat_refin_20_10")

Save:

Predictions

predictions_refin_20_10 <- c("rf_slope_Landsat_refin_20_10_prediction",
                        "rf_months_Landsat_refin_20_10_prediction")

Save:

Confusion matrices

for (prediction_name in predictions_refin_20_10) {
  # Derive test data name
  test_data_name <- paste0(gsub("_refin_20_10$", "",
                              sub("^rf_", "test_data_20_10_", 
                                  sub("_prediction$", "", prediction_name))))
  
  # Get prediction and test data
  prediction <- get(prediction_name)
  test_data <- get(test_data_name)
  
  # Compute confusion matrix
  cat("Confusion Matrix for", sub("_prediction$", "", prediction_name), ":\n")
  print(confusionMatrix(prediction, test_data$EUNIS1))
  cat("\n")
}

Plots

for (prediction_name in predictions_refin_20_10) {
  # Derive test data name
  test_data_name <- paste0(gsub("_refin_20_10$", "",
                              sub("^rf_", "test_data_20_10_", 
                                  sub("_prediction$", "", prediction_name))))
  
  # Obtain objects
  prediction <- get(prediction_name)
  test_data <- get(test_data_name)

  # Personalized title
  title <- paste("Confusion Matrix for", sub("_prediction$", "",
                                              prediction_name))

  # Plot
  print(plot_confusion_matrix(prediction, test_data$EUNIS1, title))
}

Refinement step 2

Then refitting the model and applying “Morralla” protocol again, removing only negatives until 20% of the class.

Compute predictions for all data and combine with original data

Calculate auxiliary metrics

Apply filtering function

Save

filtered_data_with_probs_2x <- c("filtered_data_20_10_slope_Landsat_probs_2x", 
                              "filtered_data_20_10_months_Landsat_probs_2x")

Save:

Compare classes before and after

compare_classes(training_subset_slope,
                filtered_data_20_10_slope_Landsat_probs,
                filtered_data_20_10_slope_Landsat_probs_2x)

compare_classes(training_subset_months, 
                filtered_data_20_10_months_Landsat_probs,
                filtered_data_20_10_months_Landsat_probs_2x)

(Appendix 6)
(compare_classes(training_subset_slope, 
                  filtered_data_20_10_slope_Landsat_probs,
                  filtered_data_20_10_slope_Landsat_probs_2x,
                  return = "plot") +
  compare_classes(training_subset_months, 
                  filtered_data_20_10_months_Landsat_probs,
                  filtered_data_20_10_months_Landsat_probs_2x,
                  return = "plot")
 ) +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A", tag_suffix = ")") +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") &
  scale_fill_manual(
    breaks = c("before", "step1", "step2"),
    labels = c("No refinement", "Refinement step 1", "Refinement step 2"),
    values = c(
      "before" = "#edf8b1", 
      "step1"  = "#7fcdbb",
      "step2"  = "#2c7fb8"
    )
  ) &
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 45000),
                  labels = label_number(scale = 1e-3, suffix = "k")) &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom", legend.title = element_blank()) +
  theme(panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank())
ggsave(here("output", "figures", "manuscript", "appendix6.jpeg"), 
       dpi = 300, width = 6, height = 4.5)

Split into training and testing

# Landsat
# Slope
set.seed(123)
split_data_20_10_2x_slope_Landsat <- split_train_test(filtered_data_20_10_slope_Landsat_probs_2x)

train_data_20_10_2x_slope_Landsat <- split_data_20_10_2x_slope_Landsat$train
test_data_20_10_2x_slope_Landsat <- split_data_20_10_2x_slope_Landsat$test

# Check overlap between training and testing datasets
sum(train_data_20_10_2x_slope_Landsat$PlotObservationID %in% test_data_20_10_2x_slope_Landsat$PlotObservationID)
[1] 0
# Months
set.seed(123)
split_data_20_10_2x_months_Landsat <- split_train_test(filtered_data_20_10_months_Landsat_probs_2x)

train_data_20_10_2x_months_Landsat <- split_data_20_10_2x_months_Landsat$train
test_data_20_10_2x_months_Landsat <- split_data_20_10_2x_months_Landsat$test

# Check overlap between training and testing datasets
sum(train_data_20_10_2x_months_Landsat$PlotObservationID %in% test_data_20_10_2x_months_Landsat$PlotObservationID)
[1] 0

Fit models

models_refin_20_10_2x <- c("rf_slope_Landsat_refin_20_10_2x", 
                           "rf_months_Landsat_refin_20_10_2x")

Save:

Predictions

predictions_refin_20_10_2x <- c("rf_slope_Landsat_refin_20_10_2x_prediction",
                                "rf_months_Landsat_refin_20_10_2x_prediction")

Save:

Confusion matrices

for (prediction_name in predictions_refin_20_10_2x) {
  # Derive test data name
  test_data_name <- paste0(gsub("_refin_20_10_2x$", "",
                              sub("^rf_", "test_data_20_10_2x_", 
                                  sub("_prediction$", "", prediction_name))))
  
  # Get prediction and test data
  prediction <- get(prediction_name)
  test_data <- get(test_data_name)
  
  # Compute confusion matrix
  cat("Confusion Matrix for", sub("_prediction$", "", prediction_name), ":\n")
  print(confusionMatrix(prediction, test_data$EUNIS1))
  cat("\n")
}
Confusion Matrix for rf_slope_Landsat_refin_20_10_2x :
Confusion Matrix and Statistics

          Reference
Prediction    Q    R    S    T
         Q  807  306  352   21
         R  988 9740  375  162
         S  548  139 1405    0
         T  177  109   12 3771

Overall Statistics
                                         
               Accuracy : 0.8314         
                 95% CI : (0.826, 0.8367)
    No Information Rate : 0.5443         
    P-Value [Acc > NIR] : < 2.2e-16      
                                         
                  Kappa : 0.7226         
                                         
 Mcnemar's Test P-Value : < 2.2e-16      

Statistics by Class:

                     Class: Q Class: R Class: S Class: T
Sensitivity           0.32024   0.9462  0.65532   0.9537
Specificity           0.95858   0.8230  0.95903   0.9801
Pos Pred Value        0.54307   0.8646  0.67161   0.9268
Neg Pred Value        0.90170   0.9276  0.95606   0.9877
Prevalence            0.13325   0.5443  0.11337   0.2091
Detection Rate        0.04267   0.5150  0.07429   0.1994
Detection Prevalence  0.07857   0.5957  0.11062   0.2152
Balanced Accuracy     0.63941   0.8846  0.80717   0.9669

Confusion Matrix for rf_months_Landsat_refin_20_10_2x :
Confusion Matrix and Statistics

          Reference
Prediction    Q    R    S    T
         Q  946  243  286   48
         R  689 8197  250  112
         S  497  137 1362    0
         T  143  115    4 3481

Overall Statistics
                                          
               Accuracy : 0.8471          
                 95% CI : (0.8415, 0.8526)
    No Information Rate : 0.5265          
    P-Value [Acc > NIR] : < 2.2e-16       
                                          
                  Kappa : 0.7567          
                                          
 Mcnemar's Test P-Value : < 2.2e-16       

Statistics by Class:

                     Class: Q Class: R Class: S Class: T
Sensitivity           0.41582   0.9431   0.7161   0.9561
Specificity           0.95947   0.8656   0.9566   0.9796
Pos Pred Value        0.62114   0.8864   0.6824   0.9300
Neg Pred Value        0.91132   0.9318   0.9628   0.9875
Prevalence            0.13780   0.5265   0.1152   0.2205
Detection Rate        0.05730   0.4965   0.0825   0.2108
Detection Prevalence  0.09225   0.5601   0.1209   0.2267
Balanced Accuracy     0.68765   0.9043   0.8363   0.9678
Plots
for (prediction_name in predictions_refin_20_10_2x) {
  # Derive test data name
  test_data_name <- paste0(gsub("_refin_20_10_2x$", "",
                              sub("^rf_", "test_data_20_10_2x_", 
                                  sub("_prediction$", "", prediction_name))))
  
  # Obtain objects
  prediction <- get(prediction_name)
  test_data <- get(test_data_name)

  # Personalized title
  title <- paste("Confusion Matrix for", sub("_prediction$", "",
                                              prediction_name))

  # Plot
  print(plot_confusion_matrix(prediction, test_data$EUNIS1, title))
}

(Appendix 9) Variable importance

enframe(
  varimp_months_Landsat_step2$varimp$values,
  name  = "variable",
  value = "importance"
) %>%
  mutate(
    importance100 = 100 * importance / max(importance)
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(importance100)) %>%
  mutate(variable_long = case_when(
    variable == "NDMI_max" ~ "Maximum NDMI",
    variable == "NDWI_max" ~ "Maximum NDWI",
    variable == "NDVI_max" ~ "Maximum NDVI",
    variable == "SAVI_max" ~ "Maximum SAVI",
    variable == "NDMI_min" ~ "Minimum NDMI",
    variable == "NDWI_min" ~ "Minimum NDWI",
    variable == "NDVI_min" ~ "Minimum NDVI",
    variable == "SAVI_min" ~ "Minimum SAVI",
    variable == "NDVI_avg_value_03" ~ "NDVI value at greening",
    variable == "NDVI_pos_value" ~ "NDVI value at peak",
    variable == "NDVI_avg_value_10" ~ "NDVI value at browning",
    variable == "SAVI_avg_value_03" ~ "SAVI value at greening",
    variable == "SAVI_pos_value" ~ "SAVI value at peak",
    variable == "SAVI_avg_value_10" ~ "SAVI value at browning",
    variable == "NDVI_auc_mar_oct" ~ "NDVI AUC greening - browning",
    variable == "SAVI_auc_mar_oct" ~ "SAVI AUC greening - browning",
    variable == "NDVI_diff_pos_march_value" ~ 
      "NDVI difference in value peak - greening",
    variable == "SAVI_diff_pos_march_value" ~
      "SAVI difference in value peak - greening",
    variable == "NDVI_diff_pos_march_doy" ~
      "NDVI difference in DOY peak - greening",
    variable == "SAVI_diff_pos_march_doy" ~
      "SAVI difference in DOY peak - greening",
    variable == "NDVI_diff_pos_oct_value" ~
      "NDVI difference in value peak - browning",
    variable == "SAVI_diff_pos_oct_value" ~
      "SAVI difference in value peak - browning",
    variable == "NDVI_diff_pos_oct_doy" ~
      "NDVI difference in DOY peak - browning",
    variable == "SAVI_diff_pos_oct_doy" ~
      "SAVI difference in DOY peak - browning",
    TRUE ~ variable
  )) %>%
ggplot(aes(x = reorder(variable_long, importance100), y = importance100)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#2c7fb8") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(x = "Predictor", y = "Importance (scaled)") +
  theme_minimal()
ggsave(here("output", "figures", "manuscript", "appendix9.jpeg"), 
       dpi = 300, width = 6, height = 4)

(Appendix 8) ROC curves

ggplot(rocdata_months_Landsat_step2$roc, aes(x = FPR, y = TPR, color = Class)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_abline(linetype = "dashed", color = "gray") +
  labs(title = paste("Multiclass ROC Curve -", model_name),
       x = "False Positive Rate (1-Specificity",
       y = "True Positive Rate (Sensitivity)",
       color = "Class (AUC)") +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "Q (AUC = 0.915)" = "#0072B2",
      "R (AUC = 0.978)" = "#D55E00",
      "S (AUC = 0.967)" = "#009E73",
      "T (AUC = 0.997)" = "#CC79A7"
    ),
    labels = c(
      "Q (AUC = 0.915)" = "Q – Wetlands (AUC = 0.915)",
      "R (AUC = 0.978)" = "R – Grasslands (AUC = 0.978)",
      "S (AUC = 0.967)" = "S – Shrublands (AUC = 0.967)",
      "T (AUC = 0.997)" = "T – Forests (AUC = 0.997)"
    )
  ) +
  theme_minimal() + ggtitle(NULL) +
  theme(legend.position = "right")
ggsave(here("output", "figures", "manuscript", "appendix8.jpeg"), 
       dpi = 300, width = 7, height = 4)
